tier: Tier 7.6b - Long-Horizon Planning / Subgoal-Control Local Diagnostic
claim: Tier 7.6b scores a bounded local subgoal-control scaffold against reactive v2.4, no-planning ablations, simple planning/RL baselines, sequence baselines, and destructive shams. The candidate passes the locked local diagnostic and routes to attribution/promotion.
caveat: Local software diagnostic scaffold only; not a promoted CRA mechanism, not broad planning, not public usefulness proof, not a new baseline freeze, not hardware/native transfer, and not AGI/ASI evidence.
